name: pm-skills
description: 60 product management skills (27 phase + 8 foundation + 10 utility + 15 tool) plus 4 sub-agents (pm-critic, pm-skill-auditor, pm-changelog-curator, pm-release-conductor) for AI agents covering the full product lifecycle from discovery through iteration. v2.16.2 closes post-v2.16.1 audit hygiene (CONTEXT.md Status refresh + wires check-context-currency validator into pre-tag bundle to prevent recurrence). v2.16.1 patched the plugin manifest schema (removed the invalid `agents` field that blocked `/plugin update` since v2.16.0); G4 P0 attestation FULL PASS cross-platform 2026-05-19. Active Orchestration: 4 dispatch skills at skills/utility-pm-{role}/ extend cross-client compatibility to Codex CLI, Cursor, Windsurf, Copilot, and Gemini CLI (VALIDATED on Codex CLI 2026-05-17 for dispatch skill inline-execution path); native sub-agent invocation on Claude Code defers to v2.17.0 pending the AGENTS/ directory rename. Doc-stack on Astro 6.3.x + Starlight 0.39.x. Carries forward v2.15.0 Sprint Skills (Foundation Sprint family + Design Sprint family + tool-note-and-vote under classification:tool), v2.12.0 OKR Skills set, v2.11.0 Meeting Skills Family, lean canvas, persona, structured templates, real-world examples, 12 workflows including the foundation-to-design end-to-end arc, an interactive skill builder, and lifecycle tools for validating and iterating skills. Follows the agentskills.io specification.
